statement: In every magma, Equation 1396 (`x = y * (((z * z) * w) * y)`) implies Equation 3770 (`x * y = (y * z) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0009
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z z) w) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y z) (op x z))
